name: 家具
description: 中式实木家具，包含方桌、椅凳等。木材为深色红木或榆木，表面打磨光滑，带有岁月包浆。桌面约80cm见方，桌腿雕刻简洁纹样。椅子为圈椅或官帽椅样式，靠背微弧，扶手圆润。
visual_reference: Chinese traditional wooden furniture, dark rosewood square table, round-back armchair, Ming dynasty style, smooth patina surface, simple carved details, warm indoor lighting, cinematic composition
narrative_function: 构建室内空间环境，体现人物生活品味与经济状况
